title: crepis bermejana
intro: Crepis bermejana, also known as Bermejana Hawk's Beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. Crepis bermejana can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in the past to make a poultice for topical application.
